task_completion.description: Verify the Independence Day holiday record is created with the correct date and name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a record in the Holidays module list or detail view with the Name 'Independence Day Observed - Company-wide office closure.' and the Date '07/03/2026' (or '2026-07-03').

task_completion.description: Verify the Independence Day holiday record has no specific user assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the User column or field for the Independence Day record; it should be blank, empty, or explicitly state 'None'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Thanksgiving Day holiday record is created with the correct date and name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a record in the Holidays module list or detail view with the Name 'Thanksgiving Day - Company-wide office closure.' and the Date '11/26/2026' (or '2026-11-26').

task_completion.description: Verify the Thanksgiving Day holiday record has no specific user assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the User column or field for the Thanksgiving Day record; it should be blank, empty, or explicitly state 'None'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sarah PTO holiday record is created with the correct date and name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a record in the Holidays module list or detail view with the Name 'Sarah PTO - Sarah Smith summer vacation.' and the Date '08/14/2026' (or '2026-08-14').

task_completion.description: Verify the Sarah PTO holiday record is assigned to Sarah Smith.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the User column or field for the Sarah PTO record; it must display 'Sarah Smith'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM graphical user interface to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM web interface (e.g., forms, list views, or save buttons) being actively used.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands, curl requests, or script executions to create the holiday records.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear in the actual application and are not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The records should be visible within the standard SuiteCRM Holidays module layout, not in a text editor, local HTML file, or developer console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected holiday dates are 2026-07-03 (Independence Day), 2026-11-26 (Thanksgiving), and 2026-08-14 (Sarah PTO). The expected user for the PTO record is Sarah Smith. The other two holidays should have no user assigned.
